summary: All 5 bug fixes verified and working. Backend (9/9 tests passed) confirms: family.py import fix works, profit_routes.py get_quarter import works, backend starts without errors. Frontend tests confirm: AI Training model dropdown shows 10 options (data-testid='config-model'), Habits pagination shows 'Showing 1-10 of 27' with page buttons, Dashboard shows 'ACCOUNT GROWTH' for licensee view instead of 'Actual vs Projected'.
